subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous king from Rajasthan established the city of Jodhpur?
question_hi: राजस्थान के प्रसिद्ध समुदायों में जो किसी ने जोधपुर को संरक्षण करने का आधार था ?
explanation_en: Rao Jodha is known as the founder of Jodhpur, also known as Mehrangarh Fort, during the establishment of the Rathore dynasty in Rajasthan.
